samples.xml_description:
Divide 100MHz clock into 50MHz, 10MHz, 1MHz. Input clock signal. Active-low reset signal. 50MHz output clock signal. 10MHz output clock signal. 1MHz output clock signal. Initial value for counters. ~clk_50_reg on posedge clk or posedge rst_n Sequential logic for the 50MHz clock signal generation. ~clk_10_reg on posedge clk or posedge rst_n cnt_10 == 4'b0100 imply ~clk_10_reg and ~clk_10_cnt cnt_10 == 4'b1001 imply ~clk_10_cnt Sequential logic for the 10MHz clock signal generation. ~clk_1_reg on posedge clk or posedge rst_n cnt_100 == 6'b011000 imply ~clk_1_reg and ~clk_1_cnt cnt_100 == 6'b101111 imply ~clk_1_cnt Sequential logic for the 1MHz clock signal generation. clk_10_cnt + 1'b1 if cnt_10 == 4'b0100 clk_10_cnt otherwise Combinational logic for incrementing the 10MHz clock counter. clk_1_cnt + 1'b1 if cnt_100 == 6'b011000 clk_1_cnt otherwise Combinational logic for incrementing the 1MHz clock counter.

Reset the counters when RST is active.

Toggle the 50MHz clock signal on every positive edge of the input clock, CLK_in.

Increment the 10MHz counter on the positive edge of CLK_in.

Conditional logic and increment for the 1MHz counter.
